title: James Heckler
compiled_truth: James Heckler is an external contact at [Csfb](companies/csfb). Over the corpus period (2000-08-24 to 2000-10-31), James Heckler sent 18 and received 74 emails, totalling 92 interactions. Top correspondents: [Benjamin Rogers](people/benjamin-rogers) (18), [Omar Al-Farisi](people/omar-al-farisi-csfb) (6), [James Bartlett](people/james-bartlett-csfb) (5), [Louis Iaconetti](people/louis-iaconetti-csfb) (4), [Don Miller](people/don-miller) (3).
